title: oreocharis tsaii
intro: Oreocharis tsaii, also known as the 'Taiwanese orchid orchid', is a plant species that belongs to the family Gesneriaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oreocharis tsaii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and improving digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, or taken as a supplement to support overall well-being.
